name: The Carthian Movement
short description: Vampiric idealists applying modern mortal political systems and democracy to Kindred society.

name: The Circle of the Crone
short description: A covenant of ritualistic Kindred who revere pagan gods, spirits, pantheons, and progenitors.

name: The Invictus
short description: A covenant of vampires determined to protect the Masquerade and rule as elites.

name: The Lancea et Sanctum
short description: The vampiric church believing Kindred are cursed to do God's dark work.

name: The Ordo Dracul
short description: A covenant of vampires known for mystic studies and desire to transcend the curse.

name: VII
short description: A mysterious group of vampires that detests Kindred and seeks to destroy them.
